title: Drone Swarm Rendezvous: Maximum Sumset Diversity
strategies: arithmetic-progression baseline: offsets 0,1,...,k-1 give only 2k-1 distinct pairwise sums (reproduces the checker's internal baseline)
seeded random-restart search: sample many k-subsets of [0,M] and keep the one with the largest sumset
greedy max-gain (Mian-Chowla / B_2 flavour): add offsets one at a time, each maximizing the number of NEW pairwise sums, then hill-climb-polish by swapping offsets
Sidon / B_2-set constructions: pack a near-perfect-difference set into the horizon so almost all pairwise sums are distinct, approaching the (unreachable) k(k+1)/2 ceiling
